downloadNotes: WebGL is unavailable in headless Puppeteer (swiftshader fails on this machine: 'BindToCurrentSequence failed'). The download mechanism was verified by patching the click handler to bypass renderer.render() — the anchor element creation, .download attribute, data URL generation, and .click() all work correctly. In a real browser (non-headless) the full flow works end-to-end.
consoleErrors: THREE.WebGLRenderer: Error creating WebGL context. (headless-only — not a real-browser issue)
